projects_date_range_check.name: projects_date_range_check
projects_date_range_check.value: "projects"."start_date" IS NULL OR "projects"."end_date" IS NULL OR "projects"."start_date" <= "projects"."end_date"

users_hr_date_range_check.name: users_hr_date_range_check
users_hr_date_range_check.value: "users"."hire_date" IS NULL OR "users"."termination_date" IS NULL OR "users"."hire_date" <= "users"."termination_date"
